_comment: Welcome popup configuration. Each object in 'popups' defines one variant. Fields: id, theme (controls colour skin), badge (emoji/icon shown above title), title, subtitle, body, cta_label, cta_href, footer_note. 'enabled' lets you turn a variant off without deleting it. 'show_once' (global) – when true the popup is shown only on the very first visit per browser.

popups.title: Hey there, welcome!
popups.subtitle: We're thrilled to have you here.
popups.body: My Project is the place where great ideas come to life. Take a look around — we think you'll love what we've built.
popups.footer_note: No account needed · Always free to browse

popups.title: Something awesome awaits!
